parameters.query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_active,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' THEN 1 END) AS new_this_week,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' THEN 1 END) AS new_today,
  ROUND(AVG(price)::numeric, 0) AS avg_price,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' THEN price END)::numeric, 0) AS avg_price_this_week,
  MIN(price) AS min_price,
  MAX(price) AS max_price,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY price) AS median_price,
  COUNT(DISTINCT province) AS provinces_covered,
  COUNT(DISTINCT city) AS cities_covered
FROM properties
WHERE status = 'active' AND price > 0;

SELECT 
  province,
  COUNT(*) AS listings,
  ROUND(AVG(price)::numeric, 0) AS avg_price,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY price)::numeric, 0) AS median_price,
  MIN(price) AS min_price,
  MAX(price) AS max_price,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' THEN 1 END) AS new_this_week
FROM properties
WHERE status = 'active' AND price > 0 AND province IS NOT NULL AND province != ''
GROUP BY province
ORDER BY listings DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
  property_type,
  COUNT(*) AS count,
  ROUND(AVG(price)::numeric, 0) AS avg_price,
  ROUND(AVG(bedrooms)::numeric, 1) AS avg_bedrooms,
  ROUND(AVG(size_sqm)::numeric, 1) AS avg_size
FROM properties
WHERE status = 'active' AND price > 0
GROUP BY property_type
ORDER BY count DESC;

SELECT 
  source,
  COUNT(*) AS listings,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' THEN 1 END) AS added_this_week,
  MAX(scraped_at) AS last_scraped
FROM properties
WHERE status = 'active'
GROUP BY source
ORDER BY listings DESC;
